dashboard.overviewBody: Check status first, then decide which section to visit.
dashboard.liveSummaryBody: The overview page answers what's in the workspace and where things stand — not four separate stat cards.
dashboard.metric.projectsBody: Project containers in the current workspace.
dashboard.quickFlowBody: From data to deployment, stay on the same operational line.
dashboard.rulesBody: This workspace ensures boundaries, rollbacks, and audit trails are always visible.
dashboard.rule0: Uploads and model artifacts go through managed signed paths.
dashboard.rule1: Sensitive operations require Cookie, workspace, and CSRF to all be valid.
dashboard.rule2: Training, eval, and deployment preserve audit information by default.
